title: noccaea thlaspidioides
intro: Noccaea thlaspidioides, also known as Alpine penny-cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. Noccaea thlaspidioides is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil, and it can also be used in tincture form, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the individual and the specific preparation.
